title: guettarda coxiana
intro: Guettarda coxiana is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Guettarda coxiana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
